title: Add FIPS mode secret to buildah run and bud
body:
If the host is in FIPS mode and /etc/system-fips exists
/run/secrets/system-fips is created in the container so that
the container can run in FIPS mode as well.
Vendor in libpod/pkg/secrets and remove the duplicate secrets code
in buildah.
Also remove the hidden --default-mounts-file flag that was being used for test,
as it is not needed anymore and makes the code simpler.

Adds the buildah side of this card: https://trello.com/c/UawSMhdW/572-openssl-fips-mode-in-containers

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan PTAL
This is a lot more work then I was thinking. I was thinking more that you would just add a one liner to the secrets patch if /etc/fips-mode then create it in the secrets directory.
Are we assuming that /run/secrets would have been mounted by the secrets patch? I was accounting for the case where no secrets are added but /etc/system-fips exists.
Basically this should be one call to SecretMounts and that returns a mount point if the mounts.conf or the fips-mode flag is set on the host.

Moved the FIPS mode support to `SecretMounts`. I left the `addFIPSModeSecret` function as that checks for the case there were no secret mounts in the mounts.conf file and the fips mode secret has the create /run/secrets as well as adding the system-fips file to it.
@rhatdan PTAL
@umohnani8 We should move to sharing libpod/pkg/secrets and make this change once and then allow all tools to share?
okay, so I should make this change in libpod and then vendor libpod/pkg/secrets into buildah and cri-o?
Them move it up before the stat, add a comment so the next time I read this, I don't say that makes no sense and remove it.
Yes so we have less cut/paste code.
While you are in there replace fmt.Errorsf with errors,Wrapf
tests pass, @rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 3088277) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@umohnani8 Needs a rebase.
@rhatdan read to be merged once tests pass. PTAL

LGTM
@mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind @baude PTAL
Ready to be merged once tests pass.
LGTM
@rh-atomic-bot r+
